{{CargoRelic
|name=Nebra Sky Disc
|class_id=22048
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=09-10
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Sept 10, 1999 AD, the Nebra sky disc was discovered by treasure hunters Henry and Mario.<br>The Nebra sky disc is a bronze astrolabe covered with a green patina, and gold symbols embedded in the body of the disc. It was discovered in Nebra, Germany, and it is presumed to be a creation of about 1600 BC, attributed to the Early Bronze Age Unetice culture. The golden symbols on the astrolabe include the sun, new moon, and a large number of fixed stars, two arc ornaments marking the angles between the winter and summer solstices, and a solar boat-like pattern at the bottom. People speculate that it may be an ancient astronomical instrument or a symbol of primitive religion.
|fame=24
|art=34
|fth=45
|civ=21
|tech=30
|ss1=In the Gaia Rocket Cabin:<br>> Space-Sensing Radar Base Effect +8%
|ss2=In the Gaia Rocket Cabin:<br>> Space-Sensing Radar Base Effect +16%
|ss3=In the Gaia Rocket Cabin:<br>> Space-Sensing Radar Base Effect +24%
|ss4=In the Gaia Rocket Cabin:<br>> Space-Sensing Radar Base Effect +40%
|ss7=In the Gaia Rocket Cabin:<br>> Space-Sensing Radar Base Effect +40%<br>In the Gaia Rocket Cabin:<br>> Space-Sensing Radar Base Effect +40% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill I.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's FTH +5
}}
